 Palosouque (Strychnos potatorum) is a plant species native to various tropical regions, known for its medicinal properties and potential health benefits. The plant is reported to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help in managing various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Palosouque include alkaloids, glycosides, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is commonly used to prepare various herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and ointments.
